---
title: "Contact"
---

We welcome inquiries from collaborators, prospective students, and members of the public interested in our work.

- **Email:** [sean.crowell@rochester.edu](mailto:sean.crowell@rochester.edu)  
- **GitHub:** [seanmrcrowell](https://github.com/erselab)  
- **Location:** Rochester, New York, United States

If you'd like to discuss potential collaborations or learn more about our research, please get in touch via email.
